headline: Klarna lands Southwest Airlines, bringing flexible payments to millions of US travelers this fall
summary: NEW YORK, July 07, 2026--Klarna, the global digital bank and payments provider, and Southwest Airlines® today announced a long-term partnership to bring new flexible, transparent payment options to millions of Southwest® customers across the United States.

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Neutral on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $55
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Christopher Stathoulopoulos   maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $44 to $55.
